# CredentialConveyance enumeration

How a client conveys credentials for a given [`TransportFamily`](./TransportFamily.md) (spec §23.1).

```csharp
public enum CredentialConveyance
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Bearer | `0` | The OAuth 2.1 bearer-token flow of §23 (HTTP). |
| Environment | `1` | Out-of-band via the child-process environment (stdio, R-23.1-b). |
| BestPractice | `2` | That transport's own best-practice mechanism (other, R-23.1-c). |
